title: Problem Discovery Before Solution Commitment
description: A community partner asks for an app, but the underlying decision, present workaround, affected users, frequency, severity, and evidence are unknown. Learners cumulatively produce problem evidence dossier through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.
Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
